findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "view-hmr-core-sources" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: The full source code (core only) of the HMR library. Always call `learn-hmr-concepts` to learn the core concepts before calling this tool. These files are the f…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
